cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Anthony could have gone to the amusement park. The question gives several time intervals when Anthony was doing different things, and we need to find a time when he was free, before the park closed at 10pm. First, let me list out all the times Anthony was occupied: 1. Anthony woke up at 6am. Not sure if this is relevant, but maybe he can't go before waking up? Though the question is about when he could have gone, so maybe not necessary unless the park opens after he wakes up. But the park's opening hours aren't mentioned, so maybe we don't consider that. 2. Leslie saw Anthony reading at the library from 6am to 8am. So Anthony was at the library during that time. Therefore, he couldn't go to the park during 6-8am. 3. Jennifer saw Anthony working out at the gym from 8am to 9am. So from 8-9am he was at the gym. So he's busy then too. 4. Anthony saw Anthony buying cookies at a bakery from 2pm to 9pm. Wait, that's a long time. From 2pm to 9pm. So
